results.rendered_html:
gaṇaka (von gaṇa)
1〉 adj. um eine grosse Summe erstanden  P. 5,1,22 , Sch.
— 2〉 m. Rechner, Berechner: kacciccāyavyaye yuktāḥ sarve gaṇakalekhakāḥ . anutiṣṭhanti pūrvāhṇe nityamāyavyayaṃ tava ..  MBH. 2,206 . gaṇakā lekhakāstathā 45,417 .
— 3〉 m. Astrolog  AK. 2,8,1,14 .  H. 482 . an. 3,35 .  MED. k. 79 .  VS. 30,20 .  R. 1,12,7 .  KATHĀS. 12,13 . gaṇakī f. die Frau eines Astrologen  P. 4,1,48 , Sch.  JAṬĀDH. _im_ ŚKDR. 
— 4〉 m. eine best. Gruppe von acht Sternen: tārāḥ puñjanikāśā gaṇakā nāma prajāpateraṣṭau  VARĀH. BṚH. 11,25 .
— Vgl. gaṇay.

results.rendered_html:
gaṇaka a. [gaṇ-ṇvul] (ṇikā f.) Bought for a large sum.
— kaḥ
1 An arithmetician.
2 An astrologer; re pāṃtha pustakadhara kṣaṇamatra tiṣṭha vaidyosi kiṃ gaṇakaśāstraviśāradosi . kenauṣadhena mama paśyati bharturaṃbā kiṃ vāgamiṣyati patiḥ sucirapravāsī  Subhāṣ. 
3 An assemblage of eight stars.
— kī The wife of an astrologer.
